events.name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers at Atlanta Falcons

headlines.description: — Tom Brady did it again to the Atlanta Falcons.
headlines.shortLinkText: Comeback, Part II: Brady breaks Falcons' hearts again, 31-27

headlines.description: — Tony Pollard ran for two touchdowns with Ezekiel Elliott sidelined by an injury for the first time in the two-time rushing champion's career, and the Dallas Cowboys beat the San Francisco 49ers 41-33 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pollard scores 2 with Elliott out, Cowboys beat 49ers 41-33

headlines.description: — Ryan Tannehill ran for two touchdowns and threw three more, and Derrick Henry ran for 147 yards and a score to move the Tennessee Titans closer to clinching their third playoff berth in four seasons Sunday routing the Detroit Lions 46-25.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tannehill has 5 TDs, Titans rout Lions 46-25

headlines.description: — Philip Rivers threw a late, tiebreaking touchdown to Zach Pascal and the Indianapolis Colts defense recovered a fumble in the end zone with 19 seconds left Sunday to seal a 27-20 victory over the Houston Texans.
headlines.shortLinkText: Colts recover another late fumble, beat Texans 27-20

events.name: New England Patriots at Miami Dolphins

headlines.description: — Undrafted rookie Salvon Ahmed and veteran Matt Breida combined for 208 yards rushing Sunday to lead the Miami Dolphins to a 22-12 victory over the New England Patriots, who were eliminated from playoff contention, ending their NFL-record run of 11...
headlines.shortLinkText: Dolphins eliminate Patriots from playoff race with 22-12 win

headlines.description: — David Montgomery rushed for a career-high 146 yards and two touchdowns as the Chicago Bears trampled Minnesota's depleted defense and hung on for a 33-27 victory on Sunday to stay in the hunt for the expanded playoffs.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bears beat Vikings 33-27 to stay in stride in playoff race

headlines.description: — Russell Wilson and the Seahawks built a big lead, and Seattle's suddenly opportunistic defense held on Sunday to beat Washington 20-15 and clinch a playoff spot.
headlines.shortLinkText: Seahawks hold on to beat Washington, clinch playoff spot

headlines.description: — The Baltimore Ravens built a 26-point halftime lead against helpless Jacksonville and rolled to a 40-7 victory Sunday that boosted their playoff chances and extended the Jaguars' losing streak to 13 games.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jackson leads surging Ravens to 40-14 rout of Jaguars

events.name: New York Jets at Los Angeles Rams

headlines.description: — Sam Darnold passed for 207 yards and the New York Jets finally earned the first victory of their miserable season Sunday, holding on for a 23-20 win that erased the possibility of the third winless 16-game season in NFL history.
headlines.shortLinkText: Erase that 0!: Jets edge Rams 23-20, avoid winless season

headlines.description: — Kyler Murray threw for a career-high 406 yards, DeAndre Hopkins had 169 yards receiving and a stellar touchdown catch, and the Arizona Cardinals improved their position in the playoff race by beating the Philadelphia Eagles 33-26 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Murray, Hopkins lead Cardinals past Eagles 33-26

events.name: Kansas City Chiefs at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — Patrick Mahomes had his full repertoire of side-arm throws, basketball-style push passes and underhanded flips on display while passing for 254 yards and three touchdowns, and the Kansas City Chiefs extended their winning streak to nine games with a...
headlines.shortLinkText: Mahomes' theatrics highlight Chiefs' 32-29 win over Saints

events.name: Cleveland Browns at New York Giants

headlines.description: — Baker Mayfield led two 95-yard touchdown drives and the Cleveland Browns moved closer to ending their 17-year playoff drought with a 20-6 victory over the New York Giants on Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mayfield, Browns move closer to playoffs, top Giants 20-6
